reviews.review_description: Hello.  I've tried several times to get out of the bedroom.  I open the door and walk into darkness.  I cannot move anywhere and only see black. I know I'm outside the bedroom because I can see inside the bedroom, but I can only rotate in a small circle in the darkness just outside the door.  I would appreciate it if you could help!
This game wont let me leave the server
I can’t get out of the bedroom

developer_response.body: To get out of the bedroom, find the door and pull the handle back towards you so you can go through the rest of the experience.

reviews.review_description: I couldn’t find the rest of the papers😭 side note: the game is scary and it’s fun.

developer_response.body: Sorry about that, they are in every room, there is a slightly hidden room near the living room (the one with the TV) that is difficult to spot the handle. Once you open the door (push away from you) it will be a laundry room. The door is on the wall opposite the bookcase in the living room.
